candidate.completion: put me on hold so I can feel wanted.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me on hold so I can feel wanted.

evaluation.rationale: The service-language pivot is specific and gives the loneliness a clear ironic turn, but the logic is slightly strained and the line stops short of feeling fully quotable or elegant.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
